steps.title: Compare influence levels
steps.content: The text says state taxes have almost no effect on most interstate moving decisions, while employment opportunities, housing, and climate are strong influences. The blank needs a phrase showing that those other factors matter more.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice A suggests agreement, and Choice B suggests that taxes are typical examples of the other factors. Choice D is too broad and does not express the comparison. The intended meaning is that taxes are made less important by stronger factors. The answer is C.
